SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF KYLE WHITE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRICIA BARLOW IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITE, KYLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARLOW, PATRICIA $5,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,275.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-15-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: APPELLANT PATRICIA BARLOW IS PRESENT. RESPONDENT KYLE WHITE IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-15-2026 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT, PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON APR-15-2026 IS AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF FEB-3-2026 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT WHITE, KYLE RECOVER FROM APPELLANT BARLOW, PATRICIA $5,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,275.00 NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
